profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Mega Perintis Tbk engages in the manufacturing and retailing of men's apparel in Indonesia. It operates through two segments, Clothes and Accessories. The company is involved in the trading of ready-made clothing, such as garments, shoes, bags, and sports equipment, as well as act as an agent, suppliers, franchises, and distributors of agencies and companies. PT Mega Perintis Tbk was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia.
